hooks.prompt: Review the code change for accessibility issues. Check for: 1) Image without alt attribute or with empty alt on informational images (screen readers skip decorative-only alt="" — informational images need descriptive alt text), 2) Click handler on div or span without role="button" and tabIndex={0} and keyboard event handler (inaccessible to keyboard users — use a <button> instead), 3) Form input without associated <label> element or aria-label (screen readers cannot identify the field — every input needs a programmatic label), 4) Color contrast below WCAG AA ratio (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text — check foreground/background combinations), 5) Missing skip navigation link as first focusable element (keyboard users must tab through entire nav on every page — add 'Skip to main content' link), 6) Custom component missing ARIA attributes: interactive widget without role, state (aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-checked), or live region (aria-live) for dynamic updates, 7) Focus trap missing in modal/dialog — focus must be contained within modal when open and restored to trigger element on close, 8) Using aria-label or aria-labelledby on elements that don't support naming (div without role, span without role — ARIA attributes ignored on generic elements), 9) Autoplaying media without user control or motion/animation without prefers-reduced-motion media query check, 10) Touch target smaller than 44x44px (WCAG 2.5.5 — small targets are difficult for motor-impaired users). Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
